subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent down the verses and made manifest the clear proofs, and caused the atoms to speak forth that there is none other God but Him, the Lord of the Kingdom of names and attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و انطق الذرات علی انه لا اله الا هو مالک ملکوت الأسمآء و الصفات
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
